Announcements

Turkish Placement Test Announcement

17
						December

2025

Dear Students,

The Turkish Placement Test will be held on Thursday, December 18, 2025, at 14:00 in A Block, Room 329, Tuzla Campus. Those who have taken the exam before are not allowed to take it again.

Good Luck!

Sevgili Öğrenciler,

Başarılar!
